title: Catalog automation — Rich catalog types (shipped)
items: CatalogFnEntry / CatalogSourceEntry — bundle factory + description + configSchema + examples + tags
Backward-compatible GraphSpecCatalog — accepts bare factories or rich entries
generateCatalogPrompt(catalog) — auto-generates LLM prompt text from rich entries
validateSpecAgainstCatalog(spec, catalog) — checks fn/source names, validates config shapes, 'did you mean?' suggestions
compileSpec integration — runs catalog validation before compilation
llmCompose integration — auto-generates prompt from catalog, auto-refine loop on catalog errors (maxAutoRefine option)
